title: Remove installer dependency on local main branch checkout
acceptanceCriteria: Installer update/current repo sync no longer requires checking out the requested local branch.
Installer can update to the requested branch tip even when that branch is already occupied by another linked worktree.
Dirty worktree safety behavior remains unchanged for stash/keep/cancel flows.
Regression coverage proves update/current sync avoids local target-branch checkout and still updates to the fetched commit.
Task bundle remains valid and fresh verification evidence is recorded.
